docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER KANBAR ENTERTAINMENT, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. TO THE EXTENT THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT PURPORTS TO OVERRIDE THE STATUTORY RIGHT TO REVOKE A WAIVER OF COUNSEL, THAT PROVISION IS SEVERED AND THE PARTIES MAY BE REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL AT THE ARBITRATION. MR. BERKE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID BERKE, TEL. NO. (310) 788-9001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. JEFFREY SPITZ OF GREENBERG & GLUSKER, TEL. NO. (310) 553-3610 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER KANBAR ENTERTAINMENT, LLC'S Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. TO THE EXTENT THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT PURPORTS TO OVERRIDE THE STATUTORY RIGHT TO REVOKE A WAIVER OF COUNSEL, THAT PROVISION IS SEVERED AND THE PARTIES MAY BE REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL AT THE ARBITRATION. MR. BERKE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
